children.text: Billie is a Berlin based BNPL provider, specialized in providing open invoice and deferred payment options in the B2B space. Adyen customers now have the possibility to add Billie as a BNPL payment method to their checkout, making online payments effortless for B2B buyers via e-commerce and m-commerce channels.

excerpt: B2B BNPL provider offering open invoice and deferred payment at checkout via Adyen.

content_features.title: B2B invoice and deferred payment
content_features.description: Offer invoice-based and deferred payment options designed for B2B checkout flows where buyers prefer paying after delivery.

content_features.title: Online checkout support
content_features.description: Available for online payments through Adyen, fitting typical e-commerce and mobile commerce purchase journeys.

content_features.title: Local coverage via Adyen configuration
content_features.description: Enable the method for supported markets and currencies as configured in your Adyen account.

content_features.title: Authorization outcomes and declines
content_features.description: Treat Billie authorizations like any other payment method: monitor decline reasons and iterate on checkout and buyer details to improve authorization success.

content_features.title: Refund and partial refund capability (via Adyen)
content_features.description: Supports refunds and partial refunds when managed through your PSP configuration, helping handle returns and order adjustments.

content_features.title: Disputes and chargebacks handling
content_features.description: Chargebacks can occur; set internal workflows to respond quickly with supporting order and delivery documentation.

content_features.title: Recurring payments support (use-case dependent)
content_features.description: Recurring may be supported through the PSP setup; validate your intended billing model and terms before enabling for subscriptions.

content_features.title: Multi-currency settlement
content_features.description: Billie supports settlement across multiple currencies depending on partner or acquirer setup.

tip: If you see Billie declines, review whether you are sending complete company and buyer details, including legal name, address, and checkout identity information.

faq.question: What is Billie?
faq.answer: Billie is a B2B buy now, pay later payment provider focused on invoice and deferred-payment flows for business buyers.

faq.question: How do I add Billie to my checkout?
faq.answer: Billie is available as a payment method through Adyen; enable it in your Adyen account and follow your existing Adyen checkout integration.

faq.question: Where is Billie available?
faq.answer: Availability depends on the markets enabled for your Adyen account configuration; check the Adyen payment method page and your contract settings for the latest coverage.

faq.question: Why are some Billie payments declined and how can I improve approval rates?
faq.answer: Declines can be driven by buyer eligibility and the quality/consistency of submitted buyer and company details. Ensure required fields are present and consistent (company name, address, identifiers) and monitor decline reasons in your PSP reporting.

faq.question: Is Billie a card payment method that uses 3D Secure?
faq.answer: No. Billie is a BNPL/invoice-type payment method and does not use card 3D Secure flows.

faq.question: Who handles refunds, disputes, and chargebacks?
faq.answer: Operational handling is typically managed through your PSP setup. Use Adyen’s tools and reporting to process refunds and respond to disputes/chargebacks with supporting evidence.

faq.question: What is Billie?
faq.answer: Billie is a B2B buy now, pay later payment provider focused on invoice and deferred-payment flows for business buyers.

faq.question: Does Billie support multiple currencies?
faq.answer: Billie support depends on market and PSP setup, so confirm shopper-facing and settlement currencies in the specific regions where you enable it.

seo.seo_description: Billie overview for merchants covering payments, acceptance, security, and operations.
seo.keywords: Billie, Billie payment provider, Billie approval rate, Billie card declines, payment network, merchant payments
